그는 상황이 어쩌다 이렇게 됐는지 정확히 알고 있다. 거짓말을 해봤자 소용없을 것이다. 시드는 주말 내내 네이트를 '캡틴'이라 불렀다. 밖으로 나가 그의 등번호가 새겨진 점퍼를 입기도 했다. 네이트는 시드가 자신의 번호를 입는 상상을 여러 번 해봤지만, 실제로 보는 것은 또 다른 문제였다. 세상에, 직접 보는 것은 꿈이 이루어진 것과 같았다. 열여섯 살 때부터 꿔온 온갖 몽정이 현실로 나타난 기분이었다.

He had gone out there and worn his jumper with his number on it. Nate had thought about Sid wearing his number multiple times before but actually seeing it was something else. God, seeing it was a dream come true. Seeing it was like every wet dream he’s had since he was sixteen come to life.

Sid invited himself back to Nate’s hotel room and Nate was powerless to say no. He isn’t sure he could ever have said no, there was simply no chance of it. It was Sid, for goodness sake. Nate was mostly trying to make sure he was actually awake and that this was actually happening.

“오, 정말 좋아하는구나.” 그가 속삭였다.
